name: Hammer of Thunderbolts
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The weapon has 5 charges. You can expend 1 charge and make a ranged attack with the weapon, hurling it as if it had the Thrown property with a normal range of 20 feet and a long range of 60 feet. If the attack hits, the weapon unleashes a thunderclap audible out to 300 feet.

thrown_attack.effect: Weapon unleashes thunderclap audible out to 300 feet

saving_throw.effect: Target and every creature within 30 feet except you must succeed or have Stunned condition until end of your next turn

thrown_attack.return: Weapon flies back to hand immediately after hitting or missing

giant_attunement.requirement: Attuned to Belt of Giant Strength or Gauntlets of Ogre Power

benefits.name: Giant's Bane
benefits.effect: When you roll 20 on d20 for attack roll against a Giant, creature must succeed on DC 17 Constitution save or die

benefits.name: Might of Giants
benefits.effect: Strength score from Belt/Gauntlets increases by 4 (to maximum 30)
